title: I think Ritsuko will be safe in Rebuild
display_title: I think Ritsuko will be safe in Rebuild
wikitext:
[]: I think Ritsuko will be safe in Rebuild             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Mon Feb 21, 2011 12:17 pm Worse that could happen this time is she gets shot in the arm.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Feb 21, 2011 12:20 pm Actually, on present form, the most likely thing is that she accidentally gets written out entirely.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Feb 21, 2011 12:25 pm Who the fuck is Ritsuko? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Mon Feb 21, 2011 12:56 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Who the fuck is Ritsuko? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 21, 2011 1:08 pm They'll keep her around for expositional technobabble purposes. There are few who can do it better than Yamaguchi-san. But seriously, the fact that she was able to explain ANYTHING about what happened at the end of 2.0 proves that she knows too much, so with any luck they'll go into precisely why this is so. Ritsuko's role as Eva-01's Guardian doesn't seem to have changed, either. They're taking this somewhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Mon Feb 21, 2011 1:32 pm Ritsuko is still NERV Japan's chief scientist. And there are two questionable things going on that have already been introduced: 1. The dummy plug system. (Nobody knew where it came from.) 2. The Rei clones seen in the 3.0 preview. Okay, so probably it's just one thing. However, note that Rei was with Ritsuko for some kind of medical check-up when she decided to call Asuka to thank her. This leads me to suppose that Ritsuko is the one maintaining both Rei and the reserve copies. However, things could be vastly different in the Rebuild continuity this time around. She could see herself as a surrogate mother to Rei for all we know. (This is more likely if she has never seen a picture of Yui. Imagine the drama when she sees one. All this based on the assumption that she loves Gendo, which might not even be the case.)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Feb 21, 2011 2:36 pm @Jorno: The dummy system came from Golgotha Base. Totally different branch of Nerv. There's nothing linking it to Rei this time around. Which would be refreshing, since the ostensible connection between the dummy system and the Rei clones never made any sense in NGE no matter how hard we tried. This still leaves the whole "what the heck is that big underground facility for?" thing open. That the oldest Rei clone is wearing a different uniform makes me think that maybe she's being kept somewhere else (would be interesting if it were at Golgotha and the dummy plug is Rei after all)... But that's neither here nor there, I guess. Regarding Ritsuko and Gendo, there aren't any intimations whatsoever, that I'm aware of, that she and Gendo have a thing. Even Ritsuko's desk cats, which were used in NGE to symbolize their relationship (with one white, one black), are both black cats now. A different dynamic would be interesting. I'd rather see Ritsuko have "new adventures" than go through the familiar self-destructive motions.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Feb 21, 2011 3:14 pm That the oldest Rei clone is wearing a different uniform

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 21, 2011 3:34 pm As it looks now, four movies are barely enough to do the children and Gendo justice - They had to cut back on the other adults (apparently, to Annos dismay - the CR states that he was sad about having to drop Misato scene(s)). Then again, Ritsuko is still there, and there's still 3.0. It's pretty hard to say what will happen to her as for now - if she doesn't get any mayor importance in 3.0, I predict that she'll share whatever fate they have in store for the Bridge Bunnies this time - if things go EoE-ish, she'll see an aparation on Gendo before tanging, and this will probably be all we see of their relationship in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Feb 21, 2011 3:38 pm Kendrix wrote: I predict that she'll share whatever fate they have in store for the Bridge Bunnies this time - if things go EoE-ish, she'll see an aparation on Gendo before tanging, and this will probably be all we see of their relationship in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 21, 2011 3:53 pm I wouldn't be so sure about that. Meh, whatever

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:08 pm The only hint that anything could be going on between Ritsuko & Gendo is a quick little jab in 1.0. The scene when Ritsuko & Misato are having a drink in the moodily lit Nerv bar (I would love to get a drink there, that's for sure) the moment Misato mentions Gendo there's a tight close up on ash falling off Ritsuko's cigarette. It's a little filmic device used to hint at something more but that's it. But I honestly don't expect we'll see much or any of Ritsuko/Gendo in 3.0.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:17 pm Nobody is safe in Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:17 pm yeah, that's what I was thinking of. The possibility is still there

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:27 pm Azathoth wrote: They don't have a relationship, it appears. Even the "you're in a sad love" thing has been cut out.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:29 pm Everyone will die except Shinji and Rei and the movie will expect us to be happy about it.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Feb 21, 2011 4:50 pm Everyone will die except Touji and Kensuke and the movie will expect us to be happy about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Mon Feb 21, 2011 5:38 pm Everyone will die except Shinji and Gendo and the movie will expect us to be happy about it.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon Feb 21, 2011 5:47 pm Everyone will die except Mari and Pen Pen and the movie will expect us to be happy about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Mon Feb 21, 2011 6:03 pm Enough.
